revision.comment: resolve category redirect (at some point, this template needs to be rewritten...)
revision.text:
<!--
;Diagnostics
* decade = {{{decade}}}
* country = {{{country}}}
* continent = {{{continent}}}
* prefix = {{{prefix}}}
* othercontinent= {{{othercontinent}}}
* subcountry= {{{subcountry}}}
--><includeonly><!--
  # Portals
-->{{YearInCountryPortalBox|{{{country}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|year={{{decade}}}}}<!--
   ######## Begin header text
   # link to country needs some trickery
-->{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the decade '''[[{{Decade link|{{{decade}}}}}]]''' in <!--
  -->{{#ifeq:{{{prefix}}}|<!--
     -->|<!-- # no prefix, so this is simple
           -->'''[[{{#if: {{{countrydab}}} | {{{countrydab}}} | {{{country}}}}}|{{{country}}}]]'''<!--
     -->|<!-- # we have a prefix, so need to strip any leading "the"
       -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%<!--
             -->|<!-- prefix does not begin with "the"
                 -->'''[[{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}]]'''<!--
             -->|<!-- prefix begins with "the"
                 -->the '''[[{{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?(.*)$|replace=%1|count=1|plain=false}} {{{country}}}]]'''<!--
       -->}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<!--
  # link to main article, but only if it exists
-->{{#ifexist:{{{decade}}}s in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|{{Cat main|{{{decade}}}s in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}
<!--
   ######## End header text
-->{{Category series navigation}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->
{{#ifeq:{{{subcountry}}}|yes<!--
 -->|<!--
 -->|{{#ifexist: Category:{{{decade}}}s by country|[[Category:{{{decade}}}s by country{{!}}{{{country}}}]]}}<!--
-->}}
{{#ifexist:Category:{{Century name from decade or year|{{{decade}}}s}} in {{#if: {{{newname|}}} | {{{newname|}}} | {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}} }}|
[[Category:{{Century name from decade or year|{{{decade}}}s}} in {{#if: {{{newname|}}} | {{{newname|}}} | {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}} }}{{!}}{{{decade}}}s]]
}}
[[Category:{{resolve category redirect|Decades in {{#if: {{{newname|}}} | {{{newname|}}} | {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}} }} }}{{!}}{{{decade}}}s]]
[[Category:{{{decade}}}s in {{{continent}}}|{{{country}}}]]
{{#if:{{{othercontinent}}}<!--
    -->|[[Category:{{{decade}}}s in {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{othercontinent}}}}}{{!}}{{{country}}}]]
}}
{{#if: {{{newname|}}} | [[Category:Decade in country category with newname parameter]]}}
}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content=This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}
</noinclude>

* country = {{{country}}}

--><includeonly><!--

| #default = <!-- do categories -->
{{#ifeq:{{{subcountry}}}|yes<!--
 -->|<!--
 -->|{{#ifexist: Category:decade}}}s by country|}}<!--
-->}}

}}

}}

}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>

</noinclude>

<!--
;Diagnostics
* decade = {{{decade}}}
* country = {{{country}}}
* continent = {{{continent}}}
* prefix = {{{prefix}}}
* othercontinent= {{{othercontinent}}}
* subcountry= {{{subcountry}}}
--><includeonly><!--
  # Portals
-->{{YearInCountryPortalBox|{{{country}}}|{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|year={{{decade}}}}}<!--
   ######## Begin header text
   # link to country needs some trickery
-->{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the decade '''[[{{Decade link|{{{decade}}}}}]]''' in <!--
  -->{{#ifeq:{{{prefix}}}|<!--
     -->|<!-- # no prefix, so this is simple
           -->'''[[{{#if: {{{countrydab}}} | {{{countrydab}}} | {{{country}}}}}|{{{country}}}]]'''<!--
     -->|<!-- # we have a prefix, so need to strip any leading "the"
       -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%<!--
             -->|<!-- prefix does not begin with "the"
                 -->'''[[{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}]]'''<!--
             -->|<!-- prefix begins with "the"
                 -->the '''[[{{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?(.*)$|replace=%1|count=1|plain=false}} {{{country}}}]]'''<!--
       -->}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<!--
  # link to main article, but only if it exists
-->{{#ifexist:{{{decade}}}s in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}|{{Cat main|{{{decade}}}s in {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}}}}}
<!--
   ######## End header text
-->{{Category series navigation}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->
{{#ifeq:{{{subcountry}}}|yes<!--
 -->|<!--
 -->|{{#ifexist: Category:decade}}}s by country|}}<!--
-->}}
{{#ifexist:Category:Century name from decade or year|{{{decade}}}s}} in {{#if: {{{newname|}}} | {{{newname|}}} | {{{prefix}}} {{{country}}} }}|

}}


{{#if:{{{othercontinent}}}<!--
    -->|
}}
{{#if: {{{newname|}}} | }}
}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content=This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}
</noinclude>

     -->|<!-- # we have a prefix, so need to strip any leading "the"

             -->|<!-- prefix does not begin with "the"
                 -->'''[[{{{prefix}}} {{{country}}}]]'''<!--
             -->|<!-- prefix begins with "the"
                 -->the '''[[{{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{prefix}}}|pattern=^the ?(.*)$|replace=%1|count=1|plain=false}} {{{country}}}]]'''<!--
       -->}}<!--
  -->}}<!--
-->}}<!--
  # link to main article, but only if it exists

{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->
{{#ifeq:{{{subcountry}}}|yes<!--

-->}}
